mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_career_plan.job ( job_category_code, job_category_name, job_level, job_level_name, min_salary, max_salary, salary_unit, source_job_ids, source_job_count, required_experience_years, required_skills, job_description, ai_confidence_score, analysis_prompt_used, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{jobCategoryCode}, #{jobCategoryName}, #{jobLevel}, #{jobLevelName}, #{minSalary}, #{maxSalary}, #{salaryUnit}, #{sourceJobIds}::jsonb, #{sourceJobCount}, #{requiredExperienceYears}, #{requiredSkills}::jsonb, #{jobDescription}, #{aiConfidenceScore}, #{analysisPromptUsed}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )

INSERT INTO ai_career_plan.job ( job_category_code, job_category_name, job_level, job_level_name, min_salary, max_salary, salary_unit, source_job_ids, source_job_count, required_experience_years, required_skills, job_description, ai_confidence_score, analysis_prompt_used, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES
( #{job.jobCategoryCode}, #{job.jobCategoryName}, #{job.jobLevel}, #{job.jobLevelName}, #{job.minSalary}, #{job.maxSalary}, #{job.salaryUnit}, #{job.sourceJobIds}::jsonb, #{job.sourceJobCount}, #{job.requiredExperienceYears}, #{job.requiredSkills}::jsonb, #{job.jobDescription}, #{job.aiConfidenceScore}, #{job.analysisPromptUsed}, #{job.createdAt}, #{job.updatedAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ai_career_plan.job ORDER BY job_category_code, job_level
SELECT * FROM ai_career_plan.job WHERE job_category_code = #{categoryCode} ORDER BY job_level

SELECT * FROM ai_career_plan.job
(job_category_name ILIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR job_category_code ILIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')
ORDER BY updated_at DESC NULLS LAST, id DESC
LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT * FROM ai_career_plan.job WHERE REGEXP_REPLACE(job_category_code, '_(INTERNSHIP|JUNIOR|MID|SENIOR)$', '') = #{categoryCode} ORDER BY CASE job_level WHEN 'INTERNSHIP' THEN 1 WHEN 'JUNIOR' THEN 2 WHEN 'MID' THEN 3 WHEN 'SENIOR' THEN 4 ELSE 99 END, id ASC

SELECT base_code FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT REGEXP_REPLACE(job_category_code, '_(INTERNSHIP|JUNIOR|MID|SENIOR)$', '') AS base_code FROM ai_career_plan.job WHERE job_category_code IS NOT NULL AND job_category_code <> '' ) t ORDER BY RANDOM() LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM ai_career_plan.job WHERE source_job_ids::jsonb @> #{jobId}::text::jsonb LIMIT 1
